title: Tenant Pack Manifest
description: Validates tenant.json at the root of a tenant pack repo (ADR-034 §3). Consumed by install.sh --pack (landing + compose), /project-init (tenant assembly), and the provisioner. Normative documentation + pack-repo CI; runtime checks are jq-based (no schema-validator dependency).

tenant_id.description: Stable tenant slug. Names the landing dir ~/.claude/packs/<tenant_id>/; written into project stack-config.json by /project-init; keys reconciler PRs.

pack_version.description: Semver of this pack's content. Stamped into .pack-install.json and stack-defaults.json tenant_pack; keys reconciler PR delivery (ADR-034 §5).

display_name.description: Human-readable tenant name for banners and provisioner output.

github.description: GitHub settings the provisioner uses when creating tenant repos.

org.description: GitHub org new tenant repos are created under.

merge_policy.description: Merge method the provisioner configures on new repos' branch protection.

database.description: Tenant database defaults, consumed by /database-design and the provisioner.

default.description: Default database provider for new tenant projects.

supabase_conditions.description: Prose: conditions under which Supabase applies instead of the default. Surfaced in the /database-design decision prompt.

clerk.description: Tenant Clerk auth settings, consumed by the provisioner and /clerk-auth.

publishable_key.description: Clerk publishable key (publishable — allowed in a pack; secret keys are NEVER pack content, ADR-035).

org_id.description: Clerk organization id the provisioner wires new apps to.

deploy.description: Tenant deploy defaults, consumed by the provisioner.

default.description: Deploy target. Single-value enum on purpose — widen when a second target exists.

cloudflare.description: Cloudflare deploy settings consumed by secret-binder (ADR-035). The Secrets Store id is deliberately NOT a field here — account id and store id are distinct 32-hex values, and the store id is always resolved live via the list-stores API.

account_id.description: Tenant's Cloudflare account id (NOT the Secrets Store id).

api_token_keychain_item.description: macOS Keychain item name holding the tenant API token — secret-binder's local fallback when <TENANT>_API_TOKEN is not in env. Names an item, never a value.

engine_url.description: Tenant recommend-capabilities engine endpoint, consumed by engine hooks.

design_tokens_path.description: Pack-relative path to the tenant design tokens, consumed by /screenshot-diff, UI skills, and /project-init vendoring.

standards.description: Map of standard name to pack-relative path. NOT installed globally — /project-init vendors these into each repo as committed files (ADR-034 §4).

claude_fragment_path.description: Pack-relative path to the org CLAUDE.md fragment. pack-installer applies it to the global CLAUDE.md ORG_OVERLAY_MANAGED region; /project-init uses it for project CLAUDE.md assembly.

gemini_generator.description: Toggles the Gemini-powered generator skill for this tenant.

secrets.description: Secret NAMES only, never values (ADR-034, ADR-035 §5). Provisioner resolves each name to a Cloudflare Secrets Store id and emits wrangler bindings.
